article.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows

harvestedTerms.summary: A detailed engineering post from OpenAI describing the design and implementation of a custom Windows sandbox for Codex, the coding agent. The article walks through why existing Windows isolation primitives (AppContainer, Windows Sandbox, Mandatory Integrity Control) were inadequate, and how the team built a custom sandbox using SIDs, write-restricted tokens, and process tokens to enforce file-write and network access constraints without requiring administrator elevation.

article.title: SpaceX and Anthropic, xAI’s Two Companies, Elon Musk and SpaceXAI’s Future

harvestedTerms.summary: A Stratechery paywalled article by Ben Thompson analyzing a reported Anthropic-xAI deal and its strategic implications for Elon Musk and SpaceX. The article excerpt is almost entirely a subscription paywall page with minimal substantive content visible — the headline and a one-line teaser ('Musk should double down on serving other companies') are the only content available for analysis.

article.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality

harvestedTerms.summary: IBM releases two new multilingual embedding models (97M and 311M parameters) built on ModernBERT, featuring 32K context windows, Apache 2.0 licensing, and top MTEB retrieval scores. The article details architecture choices including ModernBERT, Matryoshka embeddings, tokenizer pruning, and knowledge distillation for building enterprise-ready multilingual retrievers.

article.title: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses

harvestedTerms.summary: Microsoft is canceling most of its Claude Code licenses for the Experiences + Devices team, redirecting developers to GitHub Copilot CLI. The decision reflects both financial considerations (end of fiscal year) and a strategic preference for a tool Microsoft can shape internally via GitHub. Claude Code had been popular but undermined Copilot CLI adoption. Anthropic models will remain accessible through Copilot CLI and other Microsoft products.

A brief release note from Simon Willison announcing a Datasette rate-limiting plugin (datasette-ip-rate-limit 0.1a0) built using Codex (GPT-5.5 xhigh) to block poorly-behaved web crawlers. The post is primarily a practical software release announcement with minimal conceptual depth.

article.title: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation

harvestedTerms.summary: Anthropic announces a $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation covering global health, life sciences, education, and economic mobility, deploying Claude credits, technical support, and public goods (benchmarks, datasets, knowledge graphs) for low- and middle-income country programs over four years.
